title: Projects
subtitle: Real applications deployed for real clients.

rioceleste.name: Rio Celeste Wildlife Tours
rioceleste.description: SPA with React 19 and TypeScript, custom router, lazy-loaded gallery, Nodemailer contact flow, and full SEO with JSON-LD structured data.

jmride.name: JM Ride CR
jmride.description: Full-stack architecture with Next.js 15 App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind v4, PostgreSQL on Neon, and Drizzle ORM with relational design.

carlosguide.name: Carlos Salguera Tour Guide
carlosguide.description: React 18 + Vite SPA for an independent tour guide. BrowserRouter with clean URLs, optimized SEO, and active indexing in Google Search Console.

leona.name: Leona Waterfall
leona.description: Full-stack architecture with Nuxt 4 SSR, custom REST API with Nitro, and PostgreSQL database managed with Prisma ORM v7.

scrcr.name: SCRCR — Immanuel Bible Church
scrcr.description: Full-stack administrative management system built with Scrum and Azure DevOps, featuring attendance tracking, events, and role-based access control.

moonriver.name: MoonRiver Travel
moonriver.description: React + Vite SPA for a tourism agency and private transfer service in Guanacaste. Mobile-first design, smooth navigation, and integrated contact form.

brewcode.name: Brew Code — Web Agency
brewcode.description: Website for my freelance brand built with Nuxt 3 SSG. AI chatbot (Groq), quote system with Supabase and Drizzle ORM, offline PWA support, and local SEO with JSON-LD structured data.

sipauna.name: SIPAUNA — Classroom Booking
sipauna.description: Institutional classroom booking system for Universidad Nacional de Costa Rica. Real-time availability engine, bulk Excel import, role-based access control, and offline PWA support.
